description: Unique numeric identifier assigned to each customer
business_meaning: Primary Key for identifying individual customers in the system
notes: Primary key. Must be unique and non-null.

business_meaning: The name of the individual or entity making purchases
notes: Can contain nulls or missing names.

business_meaning: Contact endpoint for communication and account verification
notes: May contain empty strings or nulls.

description: Monetary value of the transaction or purchase in USD
related_kpi: Monthly Revenue; Sales Velocity; Segment Revenue
notes: Must be positive. Negative amounts represent invalid data quality issues.

description: Current transaction or account lifecycle status
business_meaning: Lifecycle indicator of the account or purchase
notes: Allowed values include active and inactive.

description: Timestamp when the transaction was completed
business_meaning: Date of record for financial and sales cycle analysis
notes: Format: YYYY-MM-DD. Updated on every transaction.

description: Indicates whether the customer has canceled or churned (1=Yes; 0=No)
business_meaning: Churn status identifier for customer retention tracking
notes: Ambiguous name. Recommended rename is is_churned.

description: Market tier or category segment of the customer
business_meaning: Categorization of customer for targeted analysis
notes: Ambiguous name. Recommended rename is market_segment.
